sentences.arabic: التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ravnoteža između posla i privatnog života je neophodna za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Balance between work and life is necessary for health.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي خَالِدٌ وَقْتًا مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ الدَّوَامِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid provodi vrijeme sa svojom porodicom nakon završetka radnog vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Khaled spends time with his family after the work shift ends.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْظُرُ خَالِدٌ إِلَى بَرِيدِهِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ فِي الْعُطْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid ne gleda svoju e-poštu tokom vikenda.
sentences.translationEn: Khaled does not look at his email during the weekend.
